name: Rich Chocolate Caramels
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sugars, corn syrup, half-and-half, and chocolate in a large heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to boil, stirring to melt the chocolate and dissolve the sugar.
3. Reduce heat to moderate and continue cooking, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches 248°F on a candy thermometer (firm-ball stage).
4. Remove from heat. Quickly stir in butter and vanilla just until blended and butter melts.
5. Pour into a well-greased 8x8x2-inch pan.
6. Cool. Cut into small squares.
7. If desired, top each square with a pecan half or almond slivers.
8. Wrap individually in plastic wrap or foil.
9. Store in a cool, dry place. Makes about 1-1/2 pounds.
